actions.thought: I am on the button with 5h 4c, which is a very weak hand. Even in a 3-handed game, 54o is generally not a profitable open-raising hand from the button against competent opponents. With the stack-to-pot ratio being so low, I am prepared to commit the rest of my chips on most turns, but calling here maximizes the potential value from his bluffs.
